purpose: Current repo state and major architectural decisions. API contracts: CONTRACTS.md. Structure: ARCHITECTURE.md. Runnable demos: examples/README.md.
project_summary: RoboDeploy is a modular robot-learning runtime: swap backends (MuJoCo, ROS2/RViz, Gazebo, Isaac Sim, real ROS2) while keeping Robot, task, policy, and sensor contracts stable. Demo YAML presets and example tasks/policies live under examples/, not in the installable package.

implemented: Robot-centric model: RoboEnv + list[Robot] + RobotTask (per-robot tasks, policies, selectors, sensor rigs).
Backends: mujoco, isaacsim, ros2_rviz, ros2_gazebo, ros2 real; backend_for_simulator() factory.
SensorRig/SensorSpec: declare logical sensors once; backend-aware registry pairs resolve sim/real/ROS2 adapters.
Observation contract: objects, images/depths, ft_forces/torques, IMU, camera intrinsics/extrinsics, sensor_status, language_instruction.
ObsPipeline: sync modes, per-sensor buffers, transforms (e.g. ColorBlobCentroid, GaussianNoise at FULL randomization).
Policy runtime: bind_runtime on reset, get_action_batch, notify_rejected, action_hz; VLAPolicy, DiffusionPolicy, PolicyChain, RobomimicPolicy.
Remote policies: ZMQ/gRPC PolicyServer + HttpRemotePolicyClient for VLA/diffusion injection.
Demo tooling: demo_session/record/replay, JSONL/HDF5 export, SequentialVecEnv, robodeploy CLI (dummy smoke), examples.cli (presets).
MuJoCo Universe: examples/catalog + mujoco_universe/run.py; showcase_scene task; sensor showcase artifacts.
MuJoCo grasp: carry_mode kinematic|none|follow|contact|weld; set_grasp_prop follow assist.
Gazebo: SceneSpec→SDF world synthesis, URDF sensor injection, ros_gz_bridge from declared sensors.
ROS2: Ros2Runtime singleton, namespaced topics, tf_extrinsics for camera frames.
CI: GitHub Actions unit tests + sensor-e2e-linux (MuJoCo/Gazebo smoke); live ROS2/Gazebo jobs when configured.
known_gaps: RoboEnv.make() does not support sensor_rigs or example custom_modules.
Tactile, lidar, proximity, and real tag/ArUco ISensor not implemented.
Gazebo IMU URDF injection not added (ROS2 subscribe path only).
Isaac Sim sensors verified via mocks in CI, not live Kit sessions.
True physics weld grasp unreliable; contact mode gates then uses follow assist.
No parallel VecEnv or batched physics stepping.
Heavyweight pretrained VLA/diffusion backends require user-injected predictors.
current_state.verification: pytest: 192 passed, 4 skipped (excluding live hardware jobs locally)

key_decisions.decision: One axis per layer (IBackend, ITask, IPolicy, ISensor); shared types only in core/types.py.
Robot + RobotTask replace env-wide task lists; per-robot arbitration and selectors.
IBackend.initialize(description, scene: SceneSpec, sensors) — not ITask.
ROS2RealBackend vs ROS2GazeboBackend; Ros2Runtime owns single rclpy init + executor.
Backend-aware sensor pair resolution; policies consume Observation, not backend.get_prop_pose().
Demo YAML under examples/config/presets.yaml; catalog combos delegate to presets as canonical config.
RoboEnv calls policy.bind_runtime() after backend init on first reset (MuJoCo IK, etc.).
RoboBridge + ActionTrajectory seqlock for decoupled control vs inference on real hardware.
Example tasks, policies, presets, and preset CLI live in examples/; robodeploy package stays library-only.
SceneSpec.props is authoritative for world layout; ObjectSpec on SceneSpec is deprecated unused.

milestones.summary: Backend-aware sensors, Gazebo/Isaac scene parity, object-aware tasks, advanced policy runtime (VLA, diffusion, remote).
Obs pipeline buffers, demo record/replay, VecEnv, domain randomization, dataset export, CI workflows.
robodeploy CLI, dummy testing stubs, CONTRACTS.md, pyproject.toml extras, doc drift cleanup.
SensorRig, perception-first examples, Gazebo URDF sensors, vision pick, TF extrinsics, live CI demos.
IMU/noise/showcase, MuJoCo Universe catalog, examples-only presets CLI, contract/spaghetti audit.
